nasb.text: In a little while the sky grew black with clouds and wind, and there was a heavy shower. And Ahab rode and went to Jezreel.

esv.text: And in a little while the heavens grew black with clouds and wind, and there was a great rain. And Ahab rode and went to Jezreel.

cnv.text: 霎時之間，天空因風雲而變為黑暗，隨著降下大雨來。於是亞哈坐上了車，往耶斯列去了。

ccb.text: 霎时间，天上乌云密布，狂风大作，下起大雨。亚哈坐着马车回耶斯列。
